svg.text: the intended look, to approve before generating · muted / low-saturation / clean 'AC clean-urban' (not chunky-retro)
MASTER PALETTE (locked — every tile is pinned to these)
MOCK TILES @ target saturation (approximations — PixelLab generates the real ones vs the same palette)
ROOFS — carry the variety (one per building)
VALUE PLAN — ground stays darkest/quietest so the CROWD reads against it (Pillar #1)
HOW IT COMPOSES — a shopfront on a 3-character street (overhang shadow + hanging sign)
crowd reads against the quiet ground
Unifiers: one hand-finished style-anchor tile + reference-on-every-call + ingest palette-snap. Hand-finish (Aseprite) is the last 20% that de-AIs it.
